product_snapshots.ts004-pro:
TOPDON Thermal Imagers TS004 Pro
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
Meet the new TS004 Pro from TOPDON: A thermal monocular built for sharp imaging and rugged, dependable outdoor performance. With 384 x 288 resolution, a smooth 50Hz refresh rate, and detection up to 650 yards, you'll be able to spot and track with confidence.
Powered by 384 x 288 IR resolution, the TS004 Pro reveals even the slightest heat signatures with striking clarity. It spots what others miss so you stay one step ahead in the field.
See Further. Stay Ready. React Sooner.
The TS004 Pro's powerful optics detect heat signatures up to 650 yards (594 meters) and clearly identify objects at 146 yards (133 meters), allowing you to prepare and respond to your surroundings, even in complete darkness.
19mm Lens for Extended View
The TS004 Pro's 19mm lens sees further and captures distant heat signatures in stunning detail. Hunters, hikers, and night-shift professionals can confidently explore, without limits.
Built for Any Environment
Designed with outdoor adventures in mind, the TS004 Pro combines rugged durability and IP67 waterproofing. It stands up to rain, dust, and the harsh environments it was designed to face. Operating reliably between 14°F to 113°F (-10°C to 45°C), you can trust it in bitter cold or scorching heat.
Even More Possibilities with the TopInfrared Remote App
Unlock more flexibility and control with the TopInfrared app. Capture photos and videos, utilize advanced features, and update your software directly from your phone. Go hands-free while remaining in control so you don't miss a thing.
A Battery that Lasts Through Any Adventure
Get up to 10 hours of continuous use with the TS004 Pro's 5,000mAh battery. Stay powered through your entire hike, outdoor trip, or hunt, and stay focused on your surroundings-not your battery life.
Store Thousands of Images
Equipped with 32 GB of internal storage, TS004 Pro can hold up to 270,000 thermal images or hours of recorded video. Capture every key moment without worrying about running out of space.
Day or Night: You Won't Miss a Thing
The TS004 Pro delivers clear visibility in any lighting condition-day or night. With 10 adjustable brightness levels, you can quickly adjust your view for the best possible clarity.
Shine Light on Every Detail
With its built-in LED light, the TS004 Pro can illuminate your immediate surroundings. You'll be able to explore, navigate, or inspect the area with confidence without extra gear to weigh you down.
The TS004 Pro can adapt to any environment. With five color palettes to choose from, you can create the necessary contrast to see clearly wherever your adventures take you.
Up to 8x Zoom for Clearer Details
Take advantage of the TS004 Pro's digital magnification. With 1x, 2x, 4x, and 8x zoom settings, you can hone in on your heat signature and see the details others miss.
See the Bigger Picture with PIP Mode
Activate the TS004 Pro's Picture-in-Picture mode to zoom in on a detail without losing sight of the full scene. Locate, identify, and track heat sources with even more accuracy.
At only 310g, the TS004 Pro is easy to carry wherever you go. Compact and lightweight, it fits effortlessly into your pack without adding bulk, ready for any outdoor adventure.
When hands-free stability is paramount, the TS004 Pro attaches to standard tripods in seconds. Perfect for long scouting sessions, open the TopInfrared app for full viewing access.
Hunting Wildlife Camping & Hiking Search & Rescue
© TOPDON Incorporated 2017. All rights reserved. 粤ICP备2023101035号-1
product_snapshots.tc001-max:
TOPDON Thermal Imagers TC001 Max
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
The TC001 Max blends thermal and visible imaging for precise, easy-to-interpret visuals. Compact and fully compatible with iOS, Android, and Windows, it's the go-anywhere thermal camera for real-world inspections.
The built-in 1.5MP visible-light camera blends with thermal imaging to provide sharper outlines, clearer textures, and accurate readings. Spot issues faster with the TC001 Max.
Clearer Views with Multiple Imaging Modes
Dual Light 1 Dual Light 2 Visible Light Infrared PIP
High-Resolution Thermal Imaging
The TC001 Max delivers sharp thermal images with enhanced 512x384 IR resolution using patented TISR technology. Small hotspots, subtle heat leaks, and small mechanical details are easy to spot.
Compatible with iOS, Android, and Windows
TC001 Max works with iOS, Android, and Windows devices. Plug it into your smartphone, tablet, or computer and start inspecting instantly-no complicated setup required.
USB-C and Lightning Ready
Plug in and go. With USB-C and Lightning adapters, you're always connected to your devices.
Analyze Smarter with TopFix
The AI-powered thermal assistant TopFix reads your thermal images, understands your questions, and delivers instant, reliable suggestions, helping you get actionable insights in seconds.
TopFix AI in the TopInfrared app is an optional add-on that includes 100 free uses for new users; continued use requires an upgrade, while all other app features remain unchanged.
10 color palettes Analyze with ease Instant report sharing
Switch between 10 color palettes to see heat patterns clearly in any scenario.
Mark points, draw lines, outline areas, or track temperature curves for reliable temperature insights in every inspection.
Capture, annotate, and share thermal results in just seconds.
See Heat Differences, Not Just Numbers
TC001 Max lets you see hot and cold areas clearly, ranging from -20°C to 550°C (-4°F to 1,022°F). It's ideal for checking heat loss, identifying warm spots, or monitoring temperature changes. Use adjustable color palettes to highlight the temperature range that matters most for the task at hand.
High Temperature Low Temperature
At just 2.8 inches long and 0.55 inches tall, and weighing just 33 grams, this compact smartphone thermal camera easily fits in a pocket. Take it anywhere your work or curiosity takes you.
Thermal Imaging for Everyday Inspections
© TOPDON Incorporated 2017. All rights reserved. 粤ICP备2023101035号-1

Your All-Day Thermal Companion
When used in conjunction with TOPDON Phoenix diagnostic scanners, this ADAS calibration tool offers a straightforward and reliable solution for calibrating advanced vehicle safety systems. With an intuitive interface, it walks technicians through each step of the calibration process, offering detailed illustrations and real-time guided operations.
The TC004 SE empowers your diagnostic capabilities. This reliable thermal camera excels in pinpointing and resolving issues across various industries, including industrial, electrical, building, HVAC, and automotive.
It offers up to 21 hours of continuous use at the lowest screen brightness and 16 hours at the highest screen brightness, giving you peace of mind during extended tasks. Imagine working just 3 hours a day-this means you can go a whole week without recharging.
Capture & Analyze with Ease
Easily record videos during inspections, enabling quick and accurate documentation of your findings for later review.
With 32GB built-in eMMC storage, you can save up to 160,000 high-quality thermal images, ensuring ample space to document and review inspection findings during long-term projects.
Effortlessly zoom from 1x to 4x to capture every detail, from intricate components to larger areas.

256x192 IR resolution and 25Hz refresh rate deliver fluid & clear thermal visuals to help you quickly spot and analyze issues in power, electrical, or building inspections.
Stable Imaging for Precision Work
Tripod-ready with a built-in 1/4-20 screw hole for stable, hands-free monitoring during equipment checks and lab tests.

product_snapshots.tc004-mini:
TOPDON Thermal Imagers TC004 Mini
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
Introducing the TC004 Mini, a compact, entry-level handheld thermal camera packed with rich features. With advanced TISR image enhancement technology, it upscales resolution from 128x128 to 240x240, ensuring crisp, detailed thermal images. Lightweight and user-friendly, it allows even beginners to quickly and accurately identify problems with ease. Ideal for diagnosing HVAC issues, overheating components, electrical faults, or leaks.
More Details, Better Results
The TISR technology takes you from 128x128 to a crisp 240x240 resolution. Combine that with a fluid 25Hz refresh rate, and you'll catch every detail with ease, making your thermal tasks faster and simpler.
Handle more tasks without frequent recharging.
Customizable Auto-Off Options
Auto Detection with Smart Alerts
Effortlessly identify anomalies with automatic detection of max, min, and center temperature spots.
When temperatures exceed your preset limits, the device triggers a visual warning and captures a photo, making it easier to locate and document issues quickly.
Built Tough, Designed for Ease
Handles 6.6ft (2m) falls with ease and is IP54-rated for tough environments.
Lightweight and ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip-take it anywhere.
Wide Temp Range with Accuracy
Covering -4°F to 842°F (-20°C to 450°C) with accuracy up to ±3.6°F (±2°C), it is perfect for detecting mechanical and electrical hotspots in industrial settings. Its high sensitivity of <40mK helps to identify insulation and moisture issues in buildings.
Tailor Your Measurements for Greater Accuracy
Easily adjust object emissivity, measurement distance, and environment temperature for more precise thermal results.
Note: Emissivity defines how well a target or material emits infrared radiation.
Versatile Color Options for Different Scenarios
Choose from 5 color modes-White Hot, Black Hot, Iron, Rainbow, and Red Hot-to match your specific work needs, ensuring you spot hidden problems with ease.
Gear Up for Winter with Thermal Precision
Things You Need to Know About
How Thermal Imaging Works
A thermal camera turns surface-level infrared radiation into visual images, but can't see through materials like glass, water, or walls.
Tips to Get High Quality Thermal Images
Maintain a recommended distance of 0.2 to 1.5 meters as the air reduces infrared light by 3%.
During use, a quick 1-2s calibration accompanied by a subtle click will occur to ensure accuracy.
Looking for a More Advanced Version?
Explore the enhanced performance of the TC004 thermal camera: 256*192 high resolution, PC image analysis, a wide 56° FOV, and more.
Purchase TC004 Mini on the TOPDON Official Websites.

TOPDON Thermal Imager TS005
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
The TS005 is an advanced thermal monocular designed for professionals in wildlife monitoring, search and rescue operations, outdoor adventures, and law enforcement. Whether in the autumn chill or the depths of winter, this robust device delivers consistent performance, allowing you to focus on your adventure with confidence and immerse yourself in the thrill of discovery.
See Farther, Sharper, and Closer
Adjust, Focus, Conquer the Night
Push the limits of your sight with an adjustable 35mm lens designed to easily spot thermal signals from greater distances than ever before. Coupled with an adjustable eyepiece, the TS005 is perfect for nighttime viewing, offering unparalleled clarity for all users, including those with myopia.
Rotate to get greater image clarity.
Rotate for a clear view. Works for mild myopia without glasses.
Pinpoint Precision, Even at Great Distances
Effortlessly identify heat variations up to 1400yd (1280m) with the 35mm telephoto lens. The built-in laser rangefinder, reaching up to 650yd (594m), allows you to accurately spot and measure targets-even in challenging conditions like fog, rain, or snow. It also includes an adjustable crosshair to ensure precise results.
Adjustable Crosshair for Precise Targeting
Reveals Wildlife in Complete Darkness
Capture Your Night Up Close
Maximize your vision with up to 8x digital zoom, allowing you to observe distant wildlife with incredible clarity as if they were right in front of you. Its narrow 10.4° * 7.9° field of view is tailored for long-range observation, ensuring you catch every detail from a distance.
Superior Imaging for Any Challenge
Equipped with a 384*288 IR resolution and high sensitivity (NETD < 35mK), the TS005 delivers sharp thermal images at a fast 50Hz refresh rate, ensuring smooth, uninterrupted tracking of moving targets. Stay focused on what matters most for every critical moment.
Every Detail, Perfectly Rendered
Coming with a 1024*768 OLED screen, the thermal monocular brings every scene into sharp focus, delivering the finest details in any situation.
Tailored Vision for Any Condition
With five color palettes-Red Hot, Iron, Rainbow, White Hot, and Black Hot-you can optimize your view for specific tasks, from detecting objects in the darkest conditions to enhancing recognition in complex terrains.
Effortless Power, Whenever You Need It
Experience seamless operation with two replaceable 18650 batteries. You can carry extras for quick swaps without worrying about polarity, even in low light, ensuring continuous operations.
Note: Each battery provides 3 hours of runtime.
Rechargeable Battery, Non-Stop Observation
Power through your outdoor activities with two batteries offering up to 6 hours of runtime on a single charge. Easily recharge via the USB-C port using power banks or portable energy solutions, so your device is always ready for action.
Adventure-Ready, Anytime, Anywhere
Stay hidden in the night with a device designed for secrecy. With no indicator lights and silent adjustments, the TS005 lets you track and observe your target without ever giving away your position.
It's IP65-rated to withstand water jets from any angle. The robust aluminum alloy housing that resists shocks and corrosion, while its matte black anodized finish adds extra durability. Ideal for professionals who need gear that matches their demanding environments.
Designed for versatility, the TS005 gives you the freedom to operate with one hand or attach it to a tripod for more stable observations. Choose your preferred method and stay focused on the task at hand.
Tripod Observation One-Handed Operation
With 64GB built-in memory, you can store over 2 million high-resolution images or record hours of video with clear audio . From critical tasks to once-in-a-lifetime encounters, every detail is securely saved, ready for review and sharing with others.
The user-friendly UI paired with a built-in compass transforms your device into a reliable guide. Easily identify your direction at a glance, ensuring you never lose your way, even in the most challenging environments.

product_snapshots.tc002c:
TOPDON Thermal Infrared Camera TC002C
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
Introducing TC002C, a specialized thermal imaging camera crafted specifically for iOS Type-C devices like the iPhone 15 & iPhone 16 Series. Offering exceptional precision in temperature detection, insulation inspection, and circuit board analysis, TC002C is your reliable companion for diverse applications. Boasting an impressive resolution of 256x192, it captures thermal imagery with unparalleled clarity and detail. Its energy-efficient design, consuming only 0.35W, ensures prolonged usage without the inconvenience of frequent recharging. With a remarkable heat sensitivity of 40mK, TC002C enables swift identification of concealed anomalies, empowering users with rapid troubleshooting capabilities.
Ideal for a multitude of tasks, TC002C excels in diverse applications such as home inspections, HVAC diagnostics, water leak detection, electrical maintenance, automotive repairs, and beyond.
EXCLUSIVELY DESIGNED FOR IOS TYPE-C DEVICES
Experience the enhanced TOPDON TC002C, now equipped with cutting-edge hardware upgrades for seamless integration with your latest Type-C Apple devices, including the iPhone 15 Series, iPhone 16 Series, and Type-C iPads . Delight in effortless and dependable connectivity perfectly tailored to your Apple ecosystem.
*It is not compatible with Android and Mac devices.
With a remarkable resolution of 256 x 192 pixels, the TC002C delivers crisp and detailed thermal images, ensuring clarity even in scenarios where surface temperatures are challenging to discern. Its exceptional accuracy and clarity render it ideal for applications involving objects with intricate temperature differentials.
Compact and lightweight, the TC002C measures a mere 2.8 inches by 1.65 inches by 0.55 inches and weighs only 30 grams. Its portable, pocket-sized design seamlessly integrates with iPhones and iPads. Encased in durable aluminum, it withstands drops, guaranteeing reliable temperature monitoring on-the-go, wherever and whenever you need it.
LOW CONSUMPTION = LONGER BATTERY LIFE
The TC002C effortlessly connects to your iPhone or iPad, drawing power directly from the device, eliminating the necessity for a separate power source. With its low power consumption of 0.35W, it maximizes battery efficiency, providing 6-8 hours of usage for iPhone and 8-10 hours for iPad on a single charge, ensuring extended operation without interruptions.
STREAMLINED APP EXPERIENCE
Unlock the full potential of the TC002C with the intuitive and user-friendly TopInfrared App. Explore advanced features tailored to your needs, including:
1.Select from three dimensions-Point, Line, and Surface-to manually check temperatures.
2.Customize temperature limits using a variety of color palettes for display.
3.Visualize real-time temperature changes in waveform graphs.
4.DIY temperature ranges by setting maximum and minimum temperature limits.

product_snapshots.tc001-plus:
TOPDON Thermal Imager TC001 Plus
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
Experience exceptional visuals with TC001 Plus, a dual-lens thermal imager designed to unveil hidden details, so image contours of objects such as circuits and pipes can be easily recognized. Sporting an impressive 256 x 192 IR resolution and an additional 1MP visible light lens, paired with the cutting-edge image fusion technology, TC001 Plus captures targets in original colors for overall precision. Compact and portable, it is ideal for home inspectors, HVAC technicians, electricians, automotive technicians, and even farmers looking to protect crops and livestock.
Dual Lens to Unveil the Unseen
TC001 Plus comes equipped with a 1MP visible light lens and an infrared lens, along with the image fusion technology to capture targets in original colors and reveal their contours, eliminating any trace of fuzziness.
Pipelines, circuits, vehicle engines, floor heating systems, and even objects with subtle temperature variations are effortlessly outlined.
Sporting an ultra-high IR camera resolution of 256x192 pixels, TC001 Plus delivers crystal-clear thermal images for precise problem identification. Its 25Hz refresh rate ensures smooth, non-lagging image display, making it easier to identify and analyze details of the targets.
Extensive & Accurate Temperature Measurement
With a temperature range from -4°F to 1022°F (-20°C to 550°C), TC001 Plus delivers precise temperature readings at 3.6°F (2°C) or 2% of the actual temperature and a temperature measurement resolution of 0.1°F (0.1°C).
It also boasts continuous measurement capabilities, generating waveform graphs for intuitive monitoring and facilitating detailed analysis of temperature variations.
Its sleek and rugged design enables you to tackle thermal tasks with ease wherever your adventures take you.
Compact and lightweight, it measures just 2.8x1.65x0.55 inches and weighs a mere 1 ounce (30 grams).
Built to withstand drops of up to 1m, it guarantees reliability in any scenario.
Easy-to-Use and Quick to Get Started
Navigate effortlessly with an intuitive interface, presenting data in text, graph, or dashboard-like charts. Multi-dimensional data display aids in understanding your bikes performance over time.
More Advanced Features with Thermal Imaging Software
Experience seamless temperature detection and data analysis with the TCView desktop software and TopInfrared app. Get detailed reports and recordings for each image, export pixel temperature charts, and set temperature alarms for quick identification.
Purchase TC001 Plus on the TOPDON Official Websites.

9mm Adjustable Focus Thermal Camera
Experience unparalleled clarity from near to far with the TS001, a long-focus Android thermal imager designed to capture sharp images, even for objects as close as PCB boards.
With a high-resolution 256x192 pixels infrared sensor and a smooth 25Hz frame rate, every detail is captured with precision. The TS001’s adjustable 9mm lens covers distances from 0.32 to 1640 feet (0.1~500m), catering to various applications including building inspections, animal observation, auto repair, and PCB inspection. Equipped with measurement and observation modes, it provides accurate temperature readings and intuitive insights into heat distribution.
Perfect for professionals such as home inspectors, automotive technicians, and electricians, the TS001 empowers you to detect, diagnose, and resolve issues with unparalleled clarity and efficiency.
Adjustable Lenses: Clear Vision from Near to Far
The TS001 offers adjustable 9mm lenses, accommodating infrared imaging needs from 0.32 to 1640 feet (0.1~500m), ensuring clarity whether viewing objects up close or at a distance.
Where Clarity Takes Center Stage
The TS001 boasts superior image quality, ensuring every detail is captured with precision. See the infrared world in stunning clarity with our 256x192 IR Resolution TS001 imager, capturing crisp images with every detail. Enjoy fluid visuals with a 25Hz infrared refresh rate for smooth and seamless viewing.
Fast Vision, Faster Action
In the world of thermal imaging, TS001's observation mode is your adept ally, swiftly capturing targets with finesse.
Capture moving objects swiftly with high accuracy and speed.
Effortlessly checking distances between objects and lenses, spanning 32 to 393 feet.
Easy-to-Use and Quick to Get Started
Navigate effortlessly with an intuitive interface, presenting data in text, graph, or dashboard-like charts. Multi-dimensional data display aids in understanding your bikes performance over time.
Precision Pathfinders of Heat and Cold
Experience temperature recognition at its finest with the TS001, your ultimate precision partner. Achieving readings with an incredible accuracy of 0.1 degrees and an error margin of less than 3%, it's the epitome of reliability. From frosty lows of -20°C to scorching highs of 550°C (-4°F to 1022°F), it covers the spectrum effortlessly. And with its high-definition camera, detecting minuscule components like PCB boards and resistors becomes a breeze.

With just a swipe, you can tailor your thermal view to focus only on what matters most to you. The intuitive color bar lets you easily set the temperature range you want to spotlight. Plus, when things heat up beyond your chosen range, you'll see it pop in bold black and white, or any other colors you fancy, making temperature differences crystal clear immediately.
Boundless Vision, Always Clear
From up close to afar, indoors to outdoors, the TS001 Thermal Imaging Camera delivers unmatched clarity. Whether you're inspecting PCB boards in the lab or monitoring boilers from a distance, conducting HVAC checks indoors, or outdoor cable inspection, TS001 has got you covered.

Brand Story-Why We Exist?
TOPDON makes repair jobs easier. Whether you are a professional, DIY
gearhead or beginner, you can leverage TOPDON’s expertise. TOPDON
cares about supporting customers through the entire repair process,
from initial diagnosis to final solution. We help you get what you
Founded in 2017 TOPDON quickly gathered a group of
automotive experts, DIY gearheads, and trained technicians to provide
users with premium services. Our founder is a pioneer in the
automotive aftermarket distribution channel with over 20 years’
experience. He knows what our clients want with a keen trained eye
toward our industry, products, and clients. We focus not only on
current needs but also prepare for future trends so we can always
offer the best solutions for our customers.
solution or one more innovation, our customers’ smiles are the reason
we keep going. Today, TOPDON has over 200 industry-leading engineers
and over 500 intellectual properties. We focus on creating a higher
accuracy and more efficiency vehicle repair and maintenance ecosystem
With TOPDON, make your automotive repair easier.
Our Vision-Where we are going?
A one-stop solution leading provider for automotive diagnosis.
We are dedicated to becoming a one-stop automobile diagnosis solution
provider. Our service is not merely limited to the tools. What we care
the most is to support clients from the very beginning of finding
problems to solving the problems, and help them get what they need.

page_snapshots.Program: TestLight:
TOPDON TestLight Program - Multiple Programs
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
New product trials! Help us build a better Topdon!
What's The TOPDON TestLight Program?
Welcome to TOPDON's beta test program for our new products! We believe in thoroughly testing every product before it hits the market. If you're a technician or a car modification enthusiast, we invite you to contact us for access to our latest Beta Test products.
At TOPDON, we are dedicated to providing our customers with the best possible products and user experiences. Your feedback is incredibly important to us, and we continuously optimize our products based on your input. By joining the TOPDON TestLight program, you'll have the opportunity to share your ideas and help us design products that are tailored to your needs and preferences. Let's work together to make better products for everyone!
Early Access To New Products
Be the first to try our latest and greatest innovations, and help us fine-tune them before they launch to the masses. Your feedback shapes the future!
Your Feedback Shapes Our Product
Your feedback is essential to shaping the future of our products. By sharing your thoughts, we can better understand user needs and preferences. Together, we can create solutions that truly work for you.
Join The Early Adopter Squad
Connect with a vibrant community of tech enthusiasts and passionate users who love being on the cutting edge. Share your experiences, tips, and feedback in a collaborative and supportive environment.
Free Product & Free Shipping
That's right! Enjoy the latest tech at no cost, delivered straight to your door. As a thank you for your invaluable insights, we'll take care of everything.
(Review results will be emailed within 10 business days. )
Receive Products and Confirm Test Start Time
Submit your results via feedback or a short survey.
Test results will be announced, and rewards will be issued accordingly.
Set start time via SN configuration.
What Products Are We Testing?
Oil, EPB, Throttle, Steering, ABS, BMS, DPF, Airbag, Injector, TPMS, Seats, Windows, Sunroof, Suspension, AdBlue, A/F, NOx, Stop/Start, AFS, Gear, Language, Transport, GPF, Gearbox, EGR, and other 50 or more maintenance functions.
For more details on test projects and activities, please refer to the PDF.
As a Beta Tester, once selected, please submit your test feedback - it is very important to us. Your participation and feedback will be recorded in our database as a loyal user. Priority will be given to you for future projects. Failure to submit feedback may affect your eligibility for future testing opportunities.
TopScan Moto Program Overview Product Features Product Specifications
We are thrilled to invite you to participate in our TopScan Motorcycle diagnostic software project where you have the chance to win amazing rewards!
Support full system diagnostics such as Engine, Transmission, ABS, BCM, suspension control and handle control. And it can manually generate a diagnostic report after scanning.
* 7 American makes: INDIAN, BRP, VICTORY, POLARS, COLEMAN, CSC, UM.
* 35 EU makes: KTM, Brands under the PIAGGIO Group（APRILIA, MOTO GUZZI, VESPA, and others.), Brands under the BENELLI Group（AJP, BRIXTON, FBMOND,I GOES, and others.), PEUGEOT, MALAGUTI, MORINI, BROUGH, KEEWAY, MGK. Click here for details.
* 12 Asian makes: HONDA, YAMAHA, SUZUKI, KAWASAKI, SYM, KYMCO, AEON ,DAELIM, HARTFORD, PGO, BENELLID, TGB.
* 1 Canadian makes: Bombardier.
AutoVIN for automatic vehicle identification.
Essential Diagnostic Functions
* Read & Clear fault codes, read Freeze Frame.
* Manually generate reports.
* Engine (Fan, Oil Pump, Relay).
* IC (Odometer, Speedometer, Water Temperature Gauge, Fuel Gauge, Trouble Light).
Motorcycle Repair Data Library
DLC (Diagnostic Link Connector) Position guidelines.
Supports 9 makes. Click here for details.

* Engine oil maintenance indicator reset

* DESMO service light reset

* Annual service warning light disabled
* Air Purifier Intake Valve, TPS Reset

FAQ About TopScan Moto Test
Why do you hold this program? We want to get as much feedback as possible from professional users and make sure our product is enough to satisfy users before we launch it.
Basically, we’ll give you free product samples, and you test and review them. You also get the chance to win bonus by uploading your feedback data in the corresponding APP.
Will my personal information be disclosed? We can't use or disclose your personal information for another reason (a secondary purpose) unless an exception applies.
If I have questions, who can I contact? Please message us via Topdon web online chat or email us: luciana@topdon.com
For more information about the event rules and rewards, please click here .
50 Or More Maintenance Services TestLight Program Program Overview Product Features Product Specifications
July 1st, 2025 - September 30st, 2025
* Devices Eligible for Registration:
TopScan Lite (For Android devices only)
TopScan Pro (For Android devices only)
Click here to view the required test features and event details.
1. Personal Goal and Rewards - Everyone can earn The unlocking progress is calculated based on 270 Points*.
FREE 50 Or More Maintenance Services software upgrade!
Complete 80 to unlock the first stage reward: Free upgrade for 1 year;
Complete 120 to unlock the second stage reward: Free upgrade for 2 years;
Complete 180 to unlock the third stage reward: Free upgrade for 3 years;
Complete 270 to unlock the fourth stage reward: Free upgrade for 5 years.
2. Top Three Finisher Rewards The Top Three
At the end of the event, the top three finishers (those who have cumulatively uploaded the most points) will be awarded.
Developers Honor Certificate
3. Monthly Growth Star Award Growth Star - Awarded Monthly
The user who has completed the most tasks and grew the most from the previous month will be selected as the monthly Growth Star winner.
A. If multiple users month-on-month data is the same at the time of settlement, the user with the largest number of uploads in the current month will rank first; if the number of uploads in the current month is still the same, the user with the largest number of uploads in the previous month will rank first; If the number of uploads in the previous month is the same, the one with the shortest time to reach the same number of uploads in the current month will be ranked first.
B. Users that have not uploaded data in the last month will not participate in the monthly growth star reward activity of the current month.
C. The first month's reward is issued to the user who uploads the most valid data in that month.
T-Kunai Program Overview Product Features Product Specifications
T-Kunai is TOPDON’s universal automotive programmer designed for car key programming, module maintenance, and airbag repair. This versatile tool can read and write EEPROM, MCU, and ECU, identify car remote transponder chips, detect frequencies, identify NFC cards, and copy ID or IC cards. Additionally, it can perform airbag repairs and mileage corrections. Stay tuned for more upcoming functions.
Now, we sincerely invite professional users proficient in key programming to join our TestLight Program for T-Kunai!
Airbag repair, a basic function necessary in automobile repair. It reads the data of the airbag module, automatically repairs and initializes the data through a powerful algorithm, and then writes the data back to the airbag module, thus realizing the repair function of the airbag module.
Currently more than 800 types of airbags have been developed. It will support more than 50 common car brands and more than 2,000 types of airbag repair soon.
Mileage repair, a basic function necessary in automotive repair. It reads the data of the instrument module, provides autonomous set values, and then writes the data back to the airbag module, thus realizing subjective repair of the mileage module.
Currently more than 260 types of mileage repair have been developed. It will support more than 50 common car brands, 20 motorcycle brands and more than 2,000 types of mileage repair soon.
Programming, Reading and Writing
Memory chip: supports multiple brands including Adesto Technologies, AKM, ALTERA, AMIC, ATMEL, CATALYST/ONSEMI, CHINGIS (PMC), EON, ESMT, EXEL, FAIRCHILD/NSC/RAMTRON, FUJITSU, GIGADEVICE, GRUNDIG, HOLTEK, KHIC, MXIC, MICROCHIP, MICRON, MITSUBISHI, NEC, NUMONYX, OKI, PCT, PHILIPS, ROHM, SEIKO (SII), SPANSION, STT, ST, WINBOND, XICOR, YMC and so on.
MCU: support multiple brands, including MOTOROLA/FREESCALE, FUJITSU, NATION, NXP, RENESAS, ST and so on.
Currently, about 1,000 types of memory, MCU chips, IMMO computers and instrument computers have been developed, and more than 1,500 types will be expanded soon.
-10°C to 40°C (14°Fto 104°F), humidity
-20°C to 75°C (-4°Fto 167°F) humidity
What are the qualifications needed to join the Program? We are seeking individuals who are experts in Key Programming and are preferably based in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, or Europe. Please note that participation is limited to 50 places .
What functions do l need to test? * Read and write EEPROM, MCU and ECU
* Identify car remote transponder chip
* Identify and copy ID or IC card
* Repair airbag and mileage
How do I know if I've been selected as a tester? Once you’ve been selected as a beta tester, we'll email you instructions for use and dispatch the product to the address you provided.
If I have questions, who can I contact? Please message us via Topdon web online chat or email us: contact@topdoninfo.com
You'd Like To Test Right Now?
Leave your information, and we will notify you as soon as there are products suitable for you! We will also launch testing activities for more products, so please stay tuned.
Overview Of Completed Programs
I’m honored to participate in the Testlight program. My suggestions and feedback were not only heard but also implemented. I truly appreciate the opportunity to contribute!
The Testlight program makes my free time way more interesting. Helping out feels really good and meaningful to me.
Thanks to the Testlight program, I’ve met some awesome people in the industry. We even got to chat about the industry on a podcast - that was pretty cool!
First impressions is this thing will be really cool when it’s finished. Full vehicle scan(not generic obd), live data, reset functions, special functions, and bi-directional controls! Definitely the perfect little tool to keep in your car.
So far I'v be used this to do pre and post scans at the shop I work at. And it’s been pretty good. It’s a pretty sweet tool. I also like you can print from your phone/tablet right to the printer.
All I can say is wow, once this obd scanner known as the TopScan is released publicly it should be a big hit. I've used it on multiple vehicles now from 2003 up including diesel and wow the features on it and been able to reset and activate different things is amazing. Awesome job Topdon.
So far very impressed with it, did some live data and the response time was very good. Super easy to use. Will try different things on my other vehicles and report any anomalies….
Got this badass fellow the other day and i gotta say its very powerful tool in a little bitty package. Almost as good as my Weinstein. It's very versatile and iv not really had any issues. So yea it does just as much as my pro level scan tools actually I would rather use this! Good job TOPDON!!!
It is great to see how much you can offer at this price point where a diy or prosumer is able to easily afford the investment short-term and the potential of big long-term cost savings. I look forward to having a input on this and whatever else is coming down the pipeline for the future. Being that I have just recently discovered these products exist as well as my own research on the company.
Why do you hold this program? We want to get as much feedback as possible from professional users and make sure our product is enough to satisfy users before we launch it. Basically, we’ll give you free product samples, and you test and review them. You also get the chance to win bonus by uploading your feedback data in the corresponding APP.
Do I need to return the product after testing is completed? No, you can keep the product.
Can I continue to use the test software features? No, we will disable the test features after the testing period. We recommend providing valid feedback to earn software upgrade rewards.

- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
Bridge The World With TOPDON
TOP-UP Progam from TOPDON?
The TOP-UP Program sponsors organizations or individuals striving to make a difference and seeking Topdon's assistance, all with the goal of aiding those in need globally.
In cities, teachers inspire motivated students.
In a small mountain village, volunteers brave harsh weather to rescue stranded hikers.
Across wilderness areas, conservationists protect endangered species.
Recognizing these efforts, TOPDON launched the Top-Up Program to sponsor organizations and individuals making a difference.
By supporting education institutions, rescue teams, and non-profits, TOPDON empowers these heroes to continue their vital work, enhancing global branding and aiding those in need worldwide.
Education Accessibility Human Safety Environment Protection
Explore a vast array of products tailored to your needs from Topdon's diverse catalog.
Satified Topdon Scholarship
Open the door to your career dreams with Topdon's scholarships, designed to empower deserving students.
Premier Student Discounts
Empower your academic and career path with Topdon's exclusive student discount.
At TOPDON, human safety is our top priority. We are committed to supporting organizations and individuals dedicated to saving lives in emergency situations, including roadside assistance, mountain rescue, and wilderness rescue. We are always ready to help.
At TOPDON, we cherish our home, the Earth. We proudly support efforts in animal protection, social responsibility, and sustainability, all aimed at creating a greener and more sustainable future.
Building Global Connections
All organizations or individuals striving to make a difference and seeking Topdon's help are eligible, including schools, roadside assistance teams, outdoor rescue groups, animal welfare organizations, and more.
What tools are available to me? All Topdon tools listed on the official website, as well as any forthcoming products, are available to participants.
Is there a cost to participate in the program? Participation in the Top-Up program is free of charge for eligible groups.
How long will I receive a response? You can leave your messages by click the ‘CONTACT’ button on this web page. After evaluating your eligibility and messages, Topdon staff will contact you within 2 working days.
Contact us to learn more about the TOP-UP Program.

page_snapshots.Program: My Story:
- HK TOPDON TECHNOLOGY CO.，LIMITED
Your Companion, Today and Tomorrow
At TOPDON, we believe that every journey, every task, and every achievement tells a unique story. For the past seven years, TOPDON has stood alongside countless customers, empowering them to overcome challenges and reach new milestones. You are the unsung heroes, and we’re excited to hear and celebrate your stories. Share your story with us and inspire others.
Together We Fix, Together We Move
From Guesswork to Certainty: The Importance of Diagnostics
A Journey Forged in Love and Determination
Fixing Cars Like Aircraft: Safety is Always the Top Priority
Restarting Life in the Bay Area: One Key That Keeps Life Moving
The Road to Freedom: Embracing Uncertainty
How a 64-Year-Old Veteran Stay Ahead of the Trend
Wrenches, Fast Lanes and Mentors: Making True Friends Along the Journey
How a Simple Tool Transformed Daily Life
An “Accident” that Makes Life Better
From Banker to Mechanic -- Breaking the Expectation
Against the Odds: Richie B Defines Resilience and Passion
Starts with Love, Grows with Responsibility
For Featured Photo Story Users
If your photo and text story is featured on our homepage, you'll receive a US$100 cash reward as our way of saying thank you for your contribution.
For Story Video Participants
You’ll receive a US$500 cash reward as appreciation for your participation in filming.
TOPDON Products Up to US$300
Product availability will depend on the specific stock in your country.
Certificate of Recognition
Receive a personalized "Everyday Hero" Certificate of Recognition, which we’ll send directly to you.
High-Quality Video Footage
Get premium video footage to use for personal promotion, whether in your workshop or on your channel.
How to Share Your Story and
Fill out the form and share your experience.
2-4 standout stories will be selected each month, with winners announced the following month.
Featured stories receive $100 and are showcased with images and text.
The top winner gets the chance to join professional filming.
$500 cash, $300 in TOPDON products, an Everyday Hero certificate, and premium media content
We want to hear from you!
Submit your story now and become part of the TOPDON journey.
Share Your Story With TOPDON
Share Your Story With TOPDON User Story Filming Process & FAQ
1. When Can I Participate? Each event window starts from the 1st of each month to the 1st of the following month.
2-4 selected image-text entries will be announced on the 20th of the next month. We will also invite one person to share their story on camera!
2. Can Non-TOPDON Users Participate? No, only TOPDON users who have purchased or own TOPDON products are eligible to participate.
3. How Do I Submit My Story? You can submit your story on the event page. There will be detailed instructions.
4. What Are the Photo Requirements? Photos should be in JPG, PNG, or JPEG format and must be high-resolution. Detailed requirements (such as resolution, orientation, and size limits) will be provided upon submission.
5. Can I Use a Nickname Instead of My Real Name? Yes, using a nickname is acceptable.
6. Can I Share Someone Else’s Story and Images? Yes, but you must have permission from the original owner, and you are responsible for any legal issues related to the content.
7. Can I Submit My Story in Another Language? Yes, don’t worry, you can tell your story in another language.
8. Can I Submit Multiple Stories? Yes, you may submit multiple stories, but each submission must have unique content and photos.
9. Can TOPDON Employees and Distributors Participate? Yes, of course! TOPDON employees and distributors are eligible to participate in this activity.
10. What Happens After I Share My Story? Selected stories will be announced on the 20th of the following month. Winners will be contacted via an email ending in “@topdon.com.” Don’t miss out.
11. Can I Make Modifications After Submitting? Yes, you can update your submission by emailing us at emma.guo@topdon.com or through official Facebook Messenger .
12. Can I Withdraw My Submission? Yes, you can withdraw before your story is selected for filming. Once you are selected, you can’t withdraw your submission.
13. How Long Until I Receive My Prize? Prizes will be sent within 20 business days after filming or after you provide your payment information.
14. Can I Share My Submission on Social Media? Yes, feel free to share your submission on social media and tag TOPDON. Don’t forget to use the relevant hashtags! #mytopdonstory #topdon
15. Are There Any Regional Restrictions? No, this activity is open to participants worldwide.
16. Where Will My Story Be Displayed? Your story may be featured on our website, forums, and social media platforms.
1. How is the Filming Process? 1) TOPDON will contact you if your story is selected. We will work with you to schedule the filming.
2) Before shooting, you will need to fill out a questionnaire, review the script, and sign a release form.
3) Then we can proceed to the next step: filming. The shooting typically takes 3-4 hours.
4) Once we finish the filming, TOPDON will start to editing the video.
5) Once the video is done, we will send you the edited video for any modifications.
2. Do I Have to Participate in Filming? No, you can choose to have only your photos and stories featured in the event, and you can still receive the $100 cash reward.
3. Where Will Filming Take Place? The filming location will be based on the script and can be anywhere convenient for you-your home, workplace, or any other location that suits the story.
4. How Long Will the Filming Take? The interview usually takes under 5 minutes, and the rest of the filming involves additional B-roll shots. The entire filming process generally lasts 3-4 hours.
5. What Should I Prepare? Complete the questionnaire, review the script, and make sure to have your TOPDON equipment on hand for filming.
6. How Will My Story Be Used? Your story will be used for brand promotion and shared on TOPDON’s social media platforms.
7. Can I See the Final Video Before Publishing? Yes, we will share the final video with you before publishing. You can make suggestions for any changes.
8. Can I modify the TOPDON video after it’s published for my own promotional use? Yes, we will provide you with the source file after the final version is released, and you can edit the video yourself. However, please ensure that your edits do not affect TOPDON’s reputation or cause any legal issues.
9. Can I Speak in a Language Other Than English? Yes, you can speak in your native language. We will arrange for a local videographer who can communicate with you in your preferred language.
10. Who Covers the Filming Costs? The filming costs are fully covered by TOPDON. There are no fees for participants to pay.
Win Rewards for Your Suggestions
We are listening! Your opinion matters to us.
If you have ideas or advice that could make this event even more exciting, please let us know!
Once your suggestion is adopted, you’ll earn a $100 cash reward as our way of saying thank you for your valuable input.
Let’s make this event unforgettable.
© TOPDON Incorporated 2017. All rights reserved. 粤ICP备2023101035号-1
